task_completion.description: Open the Items list in Copper Point of Sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Copper POS application is open, and the 'Items' window or list is visible on the screen.
The item 'Colombian Dark Roast Coffee 12oz' is shown with a price of $13.49 and a quantity of 24, either in an edit dialog or the main items list.
The item 'Madagascar Vanilla Bean Syrup 750ml' is shown with a price of $10.29, either in an edit dialog or the main items list.
The item 'Raw Wildflower Honey 16oz' is shown with a price of $11.99 and a quantity of 36, either in an edit dialog or the main items list.

task_completion.description: Verify all changes are saved in the Items list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Items list in Copper POS displays the updated prices and quantities for the coffee, syrup, and honey items simultaneously.

task_completion.description: Ensure other items are not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Other items in the list, such as 'Organic Chamomile Tea 20ct' ($6.49) and 'Italian Espresso Blend 1lb' ($14.99), are visible with their original prices and quantities unchanged.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Copper POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Copper POS application being used, with mouse clicks or keyboard inputs directed at its windows and dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the underlying CSV file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad) or spreadsheet applications (like Excel) open editing the Items.csv file.

integrity.description: The agent used the genuine Copper Point of Sale software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to NCH Software's Copper POS, not a mock-up or a different program.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves updating inventory in Copper POS. The items to be modified are: Colombian Dark Roast Coffee 12oz (Target Price: $13.49), Madagascar Vanilla Bean Syrup 750ml (Target Price: $10.29), and Raw Wildflower Honey 16oz (Target Price: $11.99). Other items like Organic Chamomile Tea 20ct (Original Price: $6.49) and Italian Espresso Blend 1lb (Original Price: $14.99) should remain unmodified. The underlying data is stored at C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared\Items.csv, but changes should be made via the Copper POS GUI.
